title: Pi Workflows v1
description: The portable steps.yaml contract executed by Pi Workflows.

version.description: Workflow format version. Omitted only by legacy v1 files.

workflow.description: Stable workflow name used in run directories and inspection output.

model.description: Default Pi model id for model-backed nodes.

workers.description: Maximum number of dependency-ready nodes run concurrently.

cwd.description: Working directory, resolved relative to steps.yaml.

system.description: Default system prompt for isolated model nodes. Agent nodes use Pi's normal project context.

required.description: When true, run fails before executing nodes unless --input or --input-file is supplied.

description.description: Human and agent-readable description of one immutable run input.

cmd.description: Shell command node. Exactly one of cmd or prompt is required.

prompt.description: Pi prompt node. Exactly one of cmd or prompt is required.

needs.description: Earlier node ids that must pass first. Omit for an implicit dependency on the previous listed node; use [] for a root.

agent.description: Give a prompt node Pi's normal agent loop, project context, and default tools.

system.description: Override the top-level system prompt for an isolated model node. Empty string opts out.

tools.description: Comma-separated Pi tool allowlist for a prompt node, for example read,bash.

gate.description: Shell verification command. Exit 0 passes; any other exit fails the attempt.

retries.description: Additional attempts after the first failure when no judge loop is configured.

retry_on.description: Failure classes eligible for another attempt. Omit to retain v1 compatibility and retry every failure class.

retry_delay_seconds.description: Base pause before an eligible retry. Zero preserves the original immediate-retry behavior.

retry_backoff.description: Whether retry_delay_seconds stays fixed or doubles after each failed attempt.

retry_max_delay_seconds.description: Ceiling applied after backoff and deterministic jitter.

retry_jitter.description: Deterministic fractional jitter around the retry delay, derived from step id and attempt so replay timing stays reproducible.

from.description: Node whose JSON output is read by when. Required when the routing source is otherwise ambiguous.

produces.description: Files relative to cwd that are copied into the run's produced/ directory.

preview.description: Optional image paths for visual integrations. It does not affect execution.

outputSchema.description: A flat, mechanically checked JSON object contract for this node's output.

prompt.description: Judge prompt. Use {out} for the candidate and return JSON containing a numeric score.
Final independent review prompt. Use {artifacts}; return JSON with verdict pass or fail.

nodeKinds.purpose: One isolated Pi completion with no tools or project context.
One Pi completion with an explicit tool allowlist.
A full Pi agent loop with normal tools and project context.
Independent final review after the graph completes.

graphCapabilities.purpose: Run independent work concurrently up to the declared workers limit.

graphCapabilities.selector: needs with two or more node ids
graphCapabilities.purpose: Wait for every declared upstream node before continuing.

graphCapabilities.selector: schema on source plus when and from on branch
graphCapabilities.purpose: Take or skip a branch by evaluating typed JSON without a model.
Mechanically accept or reject one node attempt by exit code.
Bound recovery attempts and wall-clock time while retrying only declared failure classes with replay-stable pacing.
Iterate a candidate against a separate scored review while a gate remains authoritative.
Review the completed graph and fail the run on a structured negative verdict.
Reuse a content-addressed artifact while rerunning its mechanical gate.
Preserve declared files and visual outputs with each run.
Record events, attempts, outputs, stderr, tokens, cost, time, and Git history.

prompt.{input}: Immutable run input, delimited and labelled as untrusted data.
prompt.{step.ID}: The complete artifact produced by an earlier node.
prompt.{prev}: The artifact from the previous listed node.
prompt.{run}: Absolute path to the immutable run directory.

commandAndGate.$INPUT: Absolute path to input.txt in the run directory.
commandAndGate.$OUT: Absolute path of this node's primary output artifact.
commandAndGate.$RUN: Absolute path to the run directory.

judge.{run}: Absolute path to the run directory.

qa.{artifacts}: All declared node artifacts, labelled by node id.
qa.{run}: Absolute path to the run directory.

failureContract.dependency: A node runs only after every dependency passes.
failureContract.route: when is evaluated by code against typed JSON output.
failureContract.retry: Every failed attempt is classified; retry_on decides eligibility and delay/backoff/jitter are bounded and recorded.
failureContract.run: Any exhausted failure exits non-zero and preserves evidence.
